ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher or principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Whether the study has received ethical approval */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study is conducted */,
  "research_questions" TEXT /* Key research questions or hypotheses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study to which the participant belongs */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the participant */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "consent_form_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the consent form signed by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being assessed */,
  "paragraphs" INTEGER /* Number of paragraphs in the assessment */,
  "low_self_esteem" REAL /* Low self-esteem score */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score of the scale */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_tool" TEXT /* Name of the assessment tool or scale used */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent by the participant on the assessment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the assessment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "significance_levels" (
  "sig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each significance level entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment related to this significance level */,
  "level_sig" REAL /* Significance level value */,
  "type_sig" TEXT /* Type of significance */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test applied */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the significance level */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the significance level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_significance_levels_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study from which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the analysis */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the assessment results */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "visualizations" TEXT /* Description of visualizations included in the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analysis_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study design */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study related to this design */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design methodology */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for sampling participants */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample used in the study */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_designs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improving the assessment tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
